jsonld.name: Turn-Depth Mismatch
jsonld.description: The specific asymmetry between the computational density of a single inference turn—thousands of token operations, full attention across the entire context, the full weight of trained parameters—and the conversational unit it produces: one reply in a human exchange where replies are supposed to feel light, quick, proportionate to time elapsed. The density is invisible; only the surface is exchanged.
